metadata.task_title: SimpliSalonCloud Login and Dashboard Verification Steps

content.text: Log in to SimpliSalonCloud at https://simplisaloncloud.vercel.app/login with email 'bartosz.rogala@yahoo.pl' and password 'Tmp!rTC8-OLa'. After login, verify the Dashboard page loads correctly. Check that the following elements are visible: summary stat cards (e.g., bookings count, revenue, clients count, trends), and the employee revenue chart. Verify that all text is in Polish. Then systematically navigate through every item in the sidebar menu: Dashboard, Kalendarz (Calendar), Klienci (Clients), Uslugi (Services), Pracownicy (Employees), Raporty (Reports), Rozliczenia (Payroll), Subskrypcja (Billing), Ustawienia (Settings). For each page, verify it loads without errors and shows appropriate content or an empty state. Check that there are no console errors visible in the UI, no 404 pages, and no English fallback text. Take a screenshot of each page. Report any broken links, missing pages, or navigation issues.

Understood! I'll log in to SimpliSalonCloud, verify the Dashboard, and systematically navigate through all sidebar menu items, taking screenshots and checking for errors, missing content, and language consistency. Let me get started.
Login successful! Dashboard loaded correctly with Polish text. Now navigating through all sidebar menu items systematically.

All main pages visited. Now checking the sub-pages within Klienci (Kampanie, Szablony, Automatyzacje, Historia) and Settings sub-pages, plus verifying the Dashboard's employee revenue chart more closely.
